---
name: "✨ Feature Request"
about: Suggest a new idea, chart type, or dashboard enhancement for Gridify
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## 💡 Is your feature request related to a problem?
A clear and concise description of what the problem is (e.g., "I'm always frustrated when trying to render 3D scatter plots...").

## 🚀 Proposed Solution
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. Describe how the new feature should work from a user perspective.

## 🛠️ Implementation Ideas (Optional)
If you have ideas on how to build this:
- Which frontend library components are needed? (e.g., specific Recharts / Chart.js options)
- What backend adjustments are required? (FastAPI routes, Python scripts)
- Does this require changes to the LLM prompt engineering system?

## 🎨 Visual Mockups (Optional)
Add any sketches, wireframes, or reference dashboard screenshots that illustrate your design ideas.

## ➕ Additional Context
Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.
